claim_boundary: GitHub Actions evidence is read-only run history from gh run list; PR lane only counts pull_request events and nightly lane only counts schedule/workflow_dispatch events. Job-start annotations and stale queued self-hosted runs are read-only GitHub metadata and may identify external account, billing, or runner-availability blockers, but they do not create CI streak credit.
